purpose: Part-0 re-determination ONLY: does any FREE/opened GCAP file provide a per-security crosswalk (security identifier + ultimate-parent nationality)? Grounded from ACTUAL extracted column schemas, not filenames/listings/descriptions. No separability/identification claim is made here.
environment_note: Outbound HTTPS via agent proxy 127.0.0.1:37429, CA bundle /root/.ccr/ca-bundle.crt. Stata .dta schemas parsed by reading the dta-118 <varnames> section directly (release 118, 129-byte fixed varnames). cryptography/pdf libs broken in env; NPORT_readme.pdf text recovered via raw FlateDecode of PDF content streams.

files.label: public-US-funds-data.zip (CODE)
files.data_files_with_real_columns: NONE. This zip is the N-PORT processing PIPELINE (Bash/Python/Stata code) only. It contains no data tables and therefore no column headers to enumerate. README (verbatim): 'This repository contains a full pipeline to download, parse, clean, and assemble SEC N-PORT filings into research-ready datasets.'
files.verdict_contribution: Code only. The DATA this code produces is file #2 (Drive nport.zip).

files.label: Google Drive security-level holdings DATA (LOAD-BEARING) = 'GCAP Public Security-Level Data on U.S. Fund Holdings'
files.drive_open_status: OPENED (schema read). The Drive large-file virus-scan interstitial was parsed: form action drive.usercontent.google.com/download with hidden inputs id/export/confirm=t/uuid. Real-file fetch confirmed via HTTP 206 range request: content-type application/octet-stream, content-disposition filename="nport.zip", content-range bytes 0-0/16470969928 (i.e. a 16.47 GB ZIP, NOT HTML). accept-ranges: bytes. File is genuinely fetchable from this environment; the full 16.5 GB was NOT downloaded (infeasible), but the ZIP central directory and the first member's Stata header WERE read via byte-range requests.
files.how_schema_obtained: Fetched ZIP tail (last 100KB) -> parsed ZIP64 EOCD (26 entries, central dir at 16470967314) -> enumerated all members. Fetched first 8MB (member 2019q3.dta, raw-deflate) -> inflated 100MB prefix -> parsed Stata dta-118 header (<K>=41 vars, <N>, <varnames>).
files.contents_real: 26 quarterly Stata .dta files: 2019q3.dta ... 2025q4.dta (security-fund-quarter masterfiles). Member sizes e.g. 2019q3.dta uncompressed 2,106,638,761 bytes; full list persisted in build/data/gcap_route/nport_zip_entries.json.
files.parent_nationality_field_present: NO. The ONLY geography column is 'investment_country'. Per the publisher README (GCAP, Nov 2025), 'investment_country' is grouped under 'position information' and is taken directly from the SEC Form N-PORT public filing field -> it is the issuer/position country as reported by the filer (RESIDENCE / country-of-investment type), NOT ultimate-owner CMNS nationality. There is NO column named nationality / ultimate_parent_country / cmns_country / parent_country anywhere in the 41 variables, and the README documents no such variable.
files.residence_vs_nationality: RESIDENCE (issuer/position country from raw N-PORT). NOT parent nationality.
files.codebook_quote: README title: 'GCAP Public Security-Level Data on U.S. Fund Holdings' (The Global Capital Allocation Project, November 2025). Variable groups documented: 'currency value, currency code, exchange rate, investment country [position information]; issuer name, issuer title, issuer lei, issuer cusip, issuer type [issuer information]; identifier isin, identifier ticker [security information]'. No nationality/ultimate-parent variable is listed.

raw_provenance.why: Closes the integrity-critic block on file #2: the schema is now tied to RAW, reproducible bytes from the genuine 16.47 GB Drive object, not to a derived JSON plus a prose HTTP description.
raw_provenance.captured_206_headers: build/data/gcap_route/drive_206_headers.txt (committed copy: build/contracts/gcap_route_evidence/drive_206_headers.txt). Genuine HTTP/2 206 from drive.usercontent.google.com: accept-ranges: bytes; content-range: bytes 0-0/16470969928; content-type: application/octet-stream; content-disposition: attachment; filename="nport.zip". Re-fetched 2026-06-29 with a freshly re-resolved uuid from the interstitial; server returned a real 206 partial-content (NOT 200/HTML).

build/contracts/gcap_route_evidence/zip_.contains: ZIP64 EOCD + central directory (26 members, sizes, offsets)

build/contracts/gcap_route_evidence/memb.contains: local header + raw-deflate prefix of member 2019q3.dta -> Stata dta-118 <varnames>

raw_provenance.blob_stability: Both blobs re-fetched from the live object with identical byte ranges produced byte-identical sha256 to the on-disk blobs, confirming they are the genuine source bytes of the 16.47 GB nport.zip.
raw_provenance.regen_script: build/contracts/gcap_route_evidence/regen_nport_schema.py -- reads ONLY the two committed raw blobs (no network), regenerates the 26-member list and the 41 varnames, and byte-compares to committed nport_zip_entries.json / nport_2019q3_schema.json. Prints PASS only on exact match plus route assertions (security id present; investment_country the only geography column; no nationality/ultimate_parent column).
raw_provenance.verifier_result: PASS (overall_pass=true; all 11 checks true: sha256 of both blobs, entries byte-match, 26 members 2019q3..2025q4, schema byte-match, nvar=41, has_security_identifier, only_geography_is_investment_country, no_parent_nationality_column).
raw_provenance.note_original_json_gitignored: The working schema JSONs under build/data/gcap_route/ are gitignored; committed copies live under build/contracts/gcap_route_evidence/ so the verifier compares against committed artifacts.

files.label: GCAP_FundHoldingsStatistics.zip
files.contents_real: Pre-AGGREGATED bilateral share tables (DTA/), e.g. Bilateral_Country_Shares_{corp,govt,eqty,othb}_{residency,nationality_full,nationality_th}.dta, Bilateral_{Currency,Industry,Asset}_Shares_*, Aggregate_Positions.dta, plus emu_details/ variants; FundHoldingsStatistics_ReadMe.pdf.
files.security_identifier_present: NO. These are country-level aggregates; there is no ISIN/CUSIP/LEI/security column. Unit of observation is year x investor-country x issuer-country.
files.parent_nationality_field_present: YES at COUNTRY level only ('issuer_nationality' / 'issuer_nationality_name'), but NOT joinable per-security: there is no security identifier in the file. This is the already-aggregated OUTPUT of a nationality reclassification, not a per-security crosswalk.
files.residence_vs_nationality: Both flavours are published as SEPARATE pre-aggregated tables (…_residency vs …_nationality_full / _nationality_th). 'nationality' here = issuer-nationality country aggregate, but with no security key to drive route A.
files.verdict_contribution: Cannot support route A: aggregated, no security identifier.

files.label: redrawing-the-map.zip (-> inner data.zip)

download.source: build/data/gcap_products/redrawing-the-map.zip (pre-existing); inner data.zip re-extracted for this re-run

files.crosswalk_search_result: Searched inner data.zip for a CMNS security->ultimate-parent table keyed by ISIN/CUSIP with a parent-country column. The candidate crosswalk inputs EXIST BY NAME but are shipped as MOCK / SAMPLE placeholders (the underlying CGS / Capital IQ / Orbis data are licensed and NOT redistributed).

data/raw/ciq/ciq_ultimate_parents.csv.real_content: MOCK. The single data row is literally 'Mock Data: String, Mock Data: String, Mock Data: Numeric, ...'. So the schema that WOULD give route A (cusip6 -> ultparent_country) is present as a header, but carries NO real values.
data/raw/ciq/ciq_ultimate_parents.csv.has_parent_nationality: ultparent_country = ultimate-PARENT country (nationality), but values are mock placeholders only

data/raw/Internal/Security-Masterfile-Di.note: This is the DICTIONARY (documentation) for GCAP's internal CMNS security masterfile. It documents that the licensed masterfile carries BOTH 'residency' AND 'nationality' AND 'ultimate_parent_name' keyed to isin/cusip9/figi. But this is a data dictionary, not a populated data table; the populated masterfile is licensed/internal and is NOT in the public package.

data/raw/cgs_master/ALLMASTER_ISIN.PIP.real_content: 2-line CGS sample only (pipe-delimited), not the real ALLMASTER. No country/parent column populated.

data/raw/orbis/header/ISIN_BvDID.dta.note: 2-observation mock; maps ISIN->BvD id; NO country/nationality field at all.

data_files_with_real_columns.other_cgs_master_files: CPMASTER_*.PIP.zip, AIMASTER.PIP.zip, INCMSTR.PIP.zip, ALLMASTER_ISIN.PIP.zip etc. are all 100-400 byte stubs (licensed CGS placeholders).

files.security_identifier_present: YES in the (mock) crosswalk schemas: cusip6 (ciq), isin/cusip9/figi (dictionary), ISIN (orbis).
files.parent_nationality_field_present: Schema-documented (ultparent_country in ciq mock; nationality + ultimate_parent_name in the masterfile dictionary) BUT the populated data are NOT in the public package (mock placeholders / licensed). A usable, populated per-security -> parent-nationality table is ABSENT from the free files.
files.residence_vs_nationality: The internal masterfile dictionary cleanly distinguishes 'residency' (issuer domicile) from 'nationality' (ultimate-owner country). Both columns are documented; neither is populated in the public extract.
files.verdict_contribution: Confirms the per-security parent-nationality crosswalk is a LICENSED CMNS layer; the public redrawing package supplies only its dictionary/mocks, not populated data.

files.label: CCDMS_Replication.zip (china-in-tax-havens)
files.extracted_to: build/data/gcap_route/ccdms_extract/ccdms1_replication/ (gcap data + README); Restatement_Matrices.dta reused from build/data/gcap_products/
files.crosswalk_search_result: Searched ccdms1_replication/data/raw/gcap/ for a CMNS security->ultimate-parent table keyed by ISIN/CUSIP. NONE found. The two gcap data tables are country x country bilateral AGGREGATES, not per-security.
files.security_identifier_present: NO. No ISIN/CUSIP/LEI/figi. Keys are country codes (Investor, Issuer, Destination) and Year.
files.parent_nationality_field_present: Implicitly at COUNTRY level only: 'Destination' (residency) vs 'Destination_Restated' (post-CMNS nationality restatement), and 'Position_Residency'. These are the restated bilateral matrices = the OUTPUT after the CMNS crosswalk was applied upstream, NOT the per-security crosswalk. No security key.
files.residence_vs_nationality: Distinguished at country/aggregate level: Destination (residency) vs Destination_Restated (nationality). Not per-security.
files.verdict_contribution: Cannot support route A: aggregated restated matrices, no security identifier.

4_redrawing_map.security_id: YES but in MOCK crosswalks only
4_redrawing_map.parent_nationality: documented (ultparent_country / nationality) but data are licensed mocks, not populated

drive_open_status_explicit: OPENED. nport.zip (16,470,969,928 bytes, ZIP64, 26 quarterly dta-118 members 2019q3..2025q4) was reached on the resolved drive.usercontent.google.com URL with confirm=t; ZIP central directory and first member's Stata varnames were read via HTTP-range requests (NOT an HTML interstitial). The full file was not bulk-downloaded (16.5 GB infeasible), but its actual schema WAS read from the real file. This is NOT an environment limit and NOT a filename inference.
route_verdict_basis: The free, OPENED, security-level fund-holdings data (Drive nport.zip, file #2) carries security identifiers (issuer_cusip, identifier_isin, issuer_lei) but its ONLY geography column is 'investment_country', which is the SEC N-PORT issuer/position country = RESIDENCE/domicile, per the publisher's own Nov-2025 README. There is NO ultimate-parent-nationality column (no nationality / ultimate_parent_country / cmns_country) in any of the 41 variables. Cross-checks: file #3 and file #5 carry nationality only at the pre-AGGREGATED country level with no security key; file #4 documents a per-security residency-vs-nationality masterfile (Security-Masterfile-Dictionary lists both 'residency' and 'nationality' and 'ultimate_parent_name' keyed to isin/cusip9) and a ciq cusip6->ultparent_country crosswalk, but those populated tables are LICENSED (CGS/Capital IQ/Orbis) and are shipped only as MOCK placeholders. Therefore parent nationality at the security level still requires the licensed CMNS match layer. No opened FREE file contains BOTH a security id AND a populated ultimate-parent-nationality field in the same table.
prior_verdict_note: The prior 'route A absent' was NOT earned because it rested on the unopened Drive file. That file is now OPENED and its real schema read; the conclusion ROUTE-A-ABSENT-EARNED is now grounded in the actual residence-only columns of nport.zip, not in a filename.
integrity: Every per-file schema claim above is quoted from columns extracted and read from the actual file (Stata <varnames> parsed directly; CSV/xlsx/PIP read verbatim; Drive schema read via range requests on the real 16.5 GB object). No availability or unavailability was manufactured. This artifact makes NO separability/identification claim.
verdict_provenance_note: File #2 schema re-grounded on raw committed bytes; regen verifier build/results/gcap_route_drive_open_verify.json = PASS and the captured 206 headers show the genuine 16,470,969,928-byte nport.zip. Verdict therefore STANDS as ROUTE-A-ABSENT-EARNED (security id present; only investment_country=residence; no nationality column). Had the verifier failed or the object been unreachable, the verdict would move to INCOMPLETE.
